Video.summary: Although Tony's new baby daughter, Sarah, is giving him many a sleepless night, he is nevertheless determined to outwit a serial rapist.
Video.title: Sleep Of The Just

Video.summary: A notorious New York rackateer relocates to Eastbridge during the holiday season. Tony now has to be more concerned with peace on his own turf.
Video.title: The Frame

Video.summary: Commissioner Scali and his team of officers pull out all stops as they try to beat the clock in a desperate search for the kidnapper of a very sick baby.
Video.title: The Sharp Pinch

Video.summary: Tony joins a video-dating service when he suspects one of his clients is a murderous thief. Also, Stan tries to protect Carmela from a calirvoyant's curse.
Video.title: The Heart's A Lonely Sucker

Video.summary: After Tony's expensive new automobile is stolen from him at gunpoint, he and Cyd clash over the best way to capture Eastbridge's busiest carjackers.
Video.title: Stoned

Video.summary: Chris and Rita investigate the murder of a vice cop, and Chris must deal with the victim's son.
Video.title: In Too Deep

Video.summary: Two brothers are suspected of brutally murdering their parents.
Video.title: Bad Blood

Video.summary: Chris and Rita confront a bizarre burglary ring involving the mob, murder and Chris' quirky snitch Dunn.
Video.title: Hot Rocks

Video.summary: Chris and Rita investigate the murder of an up-and-coming young tennis champ's stepfather.
Video.title: Love-15

Video.summary: Chris poses as a beauty pageant judge to find out who brutally murdered the pageant's most recent queen.
Video.title: The Queen Is Dead

Video.summary: The murder of a wealthy woman points toward her estranged husband.
Video.title: Irreconcilable Differences

Video.summary: The murder of a wealthy Guatemalan businessman takes on serious international implications.
Video.title: Scorpio Lover

Video.summary: When Reno goes to New Orleans after cold-blooded murderer, he finds himself the recipient of a "dead man's curse".
Video.title: Way Down Yonder In New Orleans

Image.alt: Way Down Yonder In New Orleans
Way Down Yonder In New Orleans
Way Down Yonder In New Orleans

Video.summary: Reno saddles up to help when a friend of Bobby's is injured after uncovering a group of cattle rustlers operating through a traveling rodeo.
Video.title: Rustlers' Rodeo

Video.summary: Chris and Rita investigate the drug overdose of a supposedly reformed addict.
Video.title: Giant Steps

Video.summary: Chris and Rita pose as an engaged couple and attend a sex therapy clinic.
Video.title: Soul Kiss

Video.summary: Reno finds himself an unwilling celebrity while in San Diego tracking a "rave" party coordinator who is responsible for the near death of a teenage party goer.
Video.title: The Late Shift

Video.summary: Reno finds himself as prey in the middle of a dangerous "hunt" after he and Bobby meet up with a former protege of Sixkiller Enterprises.
Video.title: Thrill Kill

Video.summary: When Reno locates a missing teen, he finds it nearly impossible to persuade her to leave her seemingly comfortable life as a high-priced call girl until a recent "graduate" is found murdered.
Video.title: Teen Angel

Video.summary: Reno finds himself in a dangerous web when his former partner turns to him for help in locating a dirty cop she testified against who has now issued a "contract" on her life.
Video.title: Den Of Thieves

Video.summary: Chris is wounded when he's set up for a hit man.
Video.title: Look The Other Way

Video.summary: When a love triangle involving a phony astrologist ends in murder, Chris and Rita investigate.
Video.title: Star Signs

Video.summary: Rita Infiltrates a phone sex operation to find a murderer.
Video.title: Voices

Video.summary: Although Rita objects, a gigolo/killer-turned-writer is released on parole into the custody of his publisher. When the publisher's oversexed wife is found murdered, Rita immediately suspects the parolee but later learns that he's innocent of this crime.
Video.title: Crime Of Love

Video.summary: Reno and Cheyenne must pump themselves up when they go after a former weight lifter turned drug dealer
Video.title: Muscle Beach
